auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back to your shared memory space
auth.legalNotice: By continuing, you agree to Memora's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join Memora and start archiving your memories
auth.pleaseWait: Please wait while we set things up.

home.heroDescription: Memora turns scattered screenshots, chats, and cloud links into a single, private timeline for the people who matter most.
home.heroNote: No cluttered feeds, no public profiles — just a clean space for your group's memories.
home.principlesTitle: Designed around how groups actually share photos
home.principlesSubtitle: Three simple ideas guide everything in Memora.
home.principleVisualTitle: Photos that feel like a story
home.principleVisualDesc: Albums stay focused on the people and the moment — not on menus, ads, or social noise.
home.principleSimpleTitle: You understand it at a glance
home.principleSimpleDesc: Open Memora and instantly see what your group shared last — no learning curve required.
home.principleGroupsDesc: Each group gets its own private home with shared albums, not a crowded personal feed.
home.howTitle: How Memora fits into your group
home.howSubtitle: A simple three-step flow that mirrors how you already share.
home.step1Body: Name it for your family, trip, or team. This becomes your shared photo home.
home.step2Body: Send one link to your people. They join from any device — no complicated onboarding.
home.step3Body: Your group's moments flow into one clean timeline, ready to revisit anytime.
home.albumDescription: Everyone drops their photos in one place — no more hunting through chats.
home.spaceDescription: Memora is built around small groups — families, friend circles, and close teams.
home.inviteDescription: Share a link, and your group can start adding photos in seconds. No complex setup.

dashboard.title: Your Memory Spaces
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and explore your shared group albums
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first group to start sharing and archiving memories with your family and friends.
dashboard.joinError: Failed to join group. Please check the invite code.

group.albumsEmptyDesc: Organize your photos into themed albums like "Summer 2024" or "Birthday Party."
group.memberRemoveDesc: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the group?
group.albumDeleteDesc:
Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
 This will permanently remove all photos and videos within this collection.
group.leaveDescOwner: Are you sure you want to completely delete {{name}}? This will remove all members and permanently wipe all albums.
group.leaveDescMember: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? You will no longer be able to access its albums.

album.emptyDescription: Drag and drop photos here or use the upload button above to begin preserving your memories in high quality.
album.mediaDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this media? This action cannot be undone.

createGroup.title: Create a Memory Space
createGroup.subtitle: Invite family and friends to build a unified archive together.
createGroup.namePlaceholder: e.g. The Smith Family, Euro Trip 2024
createGroup.info: By creating this group, you'll be assigned as the **Owner**. You can invite others and set storage limits (coming soon).
createGroup.editDescription: Make changes to your memory space profile here. Click save when you're done.
createGroup.name: Name

createAlbum.title: Create a New Album
createAlbum.subtitle: Themed galleries help you find and relive specific moments effortlessly.
createAlbum.info: Once created, you can immediately start uploading photos and videos to this album.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
